description: Machine-readable layout specs. visual-routing-rules.json chooses a layout; this file tells agents and the CLI how to draw it.

Reweaving Loom.action: Mr.Ai weaves two simple source ribbons through a small hand loom into one new pattern.

Third Path.action: Mr.Ai stands at a fork with two blocked paths and opens a small third path.
avoid: large road signs full of text

Label Frame.action: Mr.Ai peels oversized labels off a small portrait or object frame.

Use vs Rewrite.action: Mr.Ai moves one source card from a consumption basket into a rewrite workbench.

Coexistence Stage.action: Mr.Ai turns on two small stage lamps whose light overlaps without merging into a formula.
avoid: spotlights so large that Mr.Ai disappears

Guardrail Pit.action: Mr.Ai places a yellow guardrail before a red risk pit.

Toolchain Thread.action: Mr.Ai threads a blue line through small tool blocks.

Black Box Reveal.action: Mr.Ai opens a simple dark box and reveals mechanism cards inside.

Mini Comic Correction.action: Mr.Ai compares two or three tiny panels: assumption, check, correction.

Before/After Desk.action: Mr.Ai moves a card from an old messy desk to a clearer new workbench.

Evidence Scale.action: Mr.Ai weighs a claim card against evidence cards on a small scale.

Checkpoint Rope.action: Mr.Ai pulls one blue rope through several simple checkpoint posts in a loose loop.

Feedback Leak.action: Mr.Ai plugs a leaking red pipe before it drips into a state bucket.

Decision Gates.action: Mr.Ai stands beside four small gates; only one gate is open, the others are marked as blocked with simple red crosses.
avoid: large text labels on every gate

Nested Rings.action: Mr.Ai points at three nested hand-drawn rings, each ring holding one small object.

Evidence Clamp.action: Mr.Ai clips a goal card and an evidence card onto one simple board.

Conveyor Split.action: Mr.Ai nudges cards along a thin conveyor that splits useful output from noise.
